testcase.name: test_a_second_run_over_an_unchanged_corpus_leaves_the_store_unchanged

failure.message: pytest_bdd.exceptions.StepDefinitionNotFoundError: Step definition is not found: Given "a corpus that has already been fully re-indexed". testcase.name: test_reindexing_after_editing_a_source_document_updates_its_record_rather_than_duplicating_it
